title: Fireflyer's Chestplates
body:
![Logo that reads "mrfireflyer's Better Chestplates"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/462824942672ecd5bfd6dd3e00f0bb57ae2d4c3a.png)

Description
-
A slight tweak to the front of some chestplate model textures

When I see the front of a chest plate I kinda just see a face. More specifically, a guy with a unibrow and beard. I never really loved that, so this pack changes that.

Comparison to Vanilla
-
![Comparison](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/314963e02b2bfbd7e38ce7b67b123fe6d2b0271a.png)
